data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-04-13)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $2.65T, up by 1.89% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $83,306 and $86,100 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $84,756, up by 1.56%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading mixed. Market outperformers include HARD, BETA, and NULS, up by 80%, 33%, and 28%, respectively.

Top stories of the day:

Mechanism Capital Partner Andrew Kang Increases Bitcoin Holdings to $200 Million

Bitcoin's Current Trend Mirrors Last Year's Accumulation Phase, Analyst Says

Trump to Announce Update on Semiconductor Tariff Policy

Former U.S. Treasury Secretary Criticizes Current Tariff Levels

U.S. Senate Committee Anticipates Crypto Market Bill by August 2025

BlackRock CEO Advocates for Blockchain-Based Asset Trading

U.S. Trade Policy Adjustments Signal Concessions Amid Economic Pressures

Market movers:

ETH: $1624.54 (+1.93%)

XRP: $2.1868 (+5.87%)

BNB: $593.81 (+0.57%)

SOL: $130.55 (+4.86%)

DOGE: $0.16603 (+2.08%)

ADA: $0.6519 (+3.18%)

TRX: $0.2471 (-0.92%)

WBTC: $84768.52 (+1.53%)

TRUMP: $8.61 (+5.13%)

LINK: $13.04 (+2.35%)

Top gainers on Binance:

HARD/USDT (+80%)

BETA/USDT (+33%)

NULS/USDT (+28%)

data.title: BlackRock CEO Updates Macro Outlook, Says ‘Mega Trends’ Still Underway Amid ‘Reorientation’ of US Economy
data.description:

source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/13/blackrock-ceo-updates-macro-outlook-says-mega-trends-still-underway-amid-reorientation-of-us-economy/

data.title: Bybit will delist PROSUSDT and VIDTUSDT perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official announcement, Bybit announced that it will delist VIDTUSDT perpetual contract and PROSUSDT perpetual contract at 3:00 UTC time on April 16, 2025.

data.title: Binance: Technical failure of ZEC application using Ledger caused withdrawal problems, and we are exploring temporary solutions
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance Customer Support posted on the X platform: "We have noticed that some users have encountered problems when withdrawing ZEC assets from their Binance accounts. The problem is due to a technical failure when we used Ledger's ZEC application, which temporarily prevented some funds from being transferred out. At present, all funds are still safely stored in cold wallets, and user assets are safe (SAFU). We are working closely with the Ledger team to actively promote the repair of the problem, and we are very grateful for their support. At present, they have made the release of the relevant version a priority and are expected to complete the update before April 17, when we will gradually restore the withdrawal function of ZEC. At the same time, we are also actively exploring temporary solutions to minimize the impact of this problem on users."
